probes.probe_text: Suppose there was a significant increase in pollution levels near Limoges-Bellegarde Airport in the lead-up to 2025-12-28, which might have created a persistent haze blocking a substantial amount of solar radiation. In this scenario, would the forecaster still expect the temperature on 2025-12-28 to be higher than on 2025-12-21, or would they revise their estimate downward in light of this new information affecting solar irradiance levels at the site? summary.question_text: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Limoges – Bellegarde Airport will be higher on 2025-12-28 than on 2025-12-21?
